params.name: parts
params.description: number of presigned URL parts required to upload

items.docs:
Initiates a multipart upload and returns an upload ID with presigned URLs for each part (optional).
Part numbers starts with 1. Each part except the last one has minimum size depends on the underlying blockstore implementation.
For example working with S3 blockstore, minimum size is 5MB (excluding the last part).

info.name: Complete a presign multipart upload request

items.docs: Completes a presign multipart upload by assembling the uploaded parts.
Return a presigned URL to upload into a presigned multipart upload.
Upload a part by copying part of another object.

info.name: get commit log from ref. If both objects and prefixes are empty, return all commits.

params.name: objects
params.description: list of paths, each element is a path of a specific object

params.name: prefixes
params.description: list of paths, each element is a path of a prefix

params.name: limit
params.description: limit the number of items in return to 'amount'. Without further indication on actual number of items.

params.name: first_parent
params.description: if set to true, follow only the first parent upon reaching a merge commit

params.name: since
params.description: Show commits more recent than a specific date-time. In case used with stop_at parameter, will stop at the first commit that meets any of the conditions.

params.name: stop_at
params.description: A reference to stop at. In case used with since parameter, will stop at the first commit that meets any of the conditions.

info.name: associate staging on this physical address with a path

items.docs:
Link the physical address with the path in lakeFS, creating an uncommitted change.
The given address can be one generated by getPhysicalAddress, or an address outside the repository's storage namespace.
